revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: #FCE; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="nonfree table-nonfree"|{{{1|Non-free}}}<noinclude>
|}

{{confuse|Template:Non-free}}
{{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
[[Category:Software table cell templates]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23518067722|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #FCE; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="nonfree table-nonfree"|{{{1|Non-free}}}<noinclude> |}
{{confuse|Template:Non-free}} {{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
